video_id: United in Grief - Paris Cavanagh - Senior Contemporary 2023.mp4.mp3
transcript: Before I go and pass the sleep, love me for me. I bare my soul and now I'm free. I hope you'll find some peace of mind in this lifetime Tell them, tell them, tell them the truth I hope you find some paradise Tell them, tell them the truth Tell Tell him, tell him, tell him. Tell him you're... I've been going through something. 1,855 days. I've been going through something. Be afraid. What is a bitch in a miniskirt? A man and his feelings were bitter, nerd. What is a woman that really hurt? A demon you're better on killing, nerd. What is a relative making repetitive narratives on how you did it first? That is a predator in reverse All of your presidents, he would thirst What is a neighborhood reputable? That is a snitch on a pedestal What is a house with a better view? A family broken in variables What is a rapper with jewelry? A way that I show my maturity What if I call on security? That mean I'm calling on God for purity I wanna get me a therapist I can debate all my theories and sharing it, whoa Consolidate all my comparisons Humble enough because time was imperative, whoa Started to feel like it's only one answer to everything I don't know where it is, whoa Popping a bottle of claretin, whoa Is it my head or my epic as well? Shaking and moving like what am I doing? I'm flipping my time through the Rolodex Indulging myself in my life and my music The world that I'm in is a cul-de-sac The world that we in is just menacing The demons portray the religionists I'm waking up one in another A woman, I hope the psychologist listening We'll be right back. Indulge myself in my life and my music The world that I'm in is a cul-de-sac The world that we in is just menacing The demons portray the religionists I'm waking up one in another, a woman I hope the psychologist listening The new Mercedes with black G-Wagon away from it was all for rap I was 28 years young, 20 million in tax Bought a couple of mansions, just for practice 500 in in jewelry, chain was magic, never had it in public, late reaction, 50k to cousins, post a caption, pray none of my enemies hold me captive, I grieve different, I grieve different, I met a hundred third night in Chicago, North America tour, my eye closed Fee-fi-fo-funk, she was the motto, dedicated to the songs I wrote in the Bible Eyes like green, penetrating the moon, like hair done in a bun, energy in the room Like Big Bang for theory, God, hope you hear me, phone off the ring to tell the world I'm busy Fair enough, green eyes that her mother didn't care enough Sympathized when her daddy in the chain gang Her first brother got killed, he was 21 I was 9 when they put Lamont in the grave Heartbroken when Estelle didn't say goodbye Chad left his body after we FaceTimed Green 9 said to be okay, first two or six to paint away I grieve different I grieve difference And Luma said he was black, G-Wagon away from It was all for rap, I was 28 years young, 20 million in tax Bought a couple of mansions, checked for practice 500 in jewelry, chain was magic, never had it in public Late reactions, 50k to cousins, post a caption Pray none of my my enemies hold me captive, I grieve difference, everybody grieves difference, I grieve difference. © transcript Emily Beynon
